creator: bdrewery@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Thierry Thomas from comment #4)
> If DBLOCAL is on, that means that your DB is local: you should unset it!
> 
> Maybe DBLOCAL_DESC is badly worded? Don't hesitate to rewrite it, english is
> not my native language.

No, I'm just stupid and not paying attention.

Ignore me.

Thanks!
